scripts.test:py: python3 -m venv .venv-pytest && . .venv-pytest/bin/activate && python -m pip install -q -U pip && python -m pip install -q -r embedding/requirements.txt -r embedding/requirements-dev.txt -r reranker/requirements.txt -r reranker/requirements-dev.txt && pytest --cov=embedding.server --cov=reranker.server --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=100
scripts.test:integration: NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 docker-compose down -v --remove-orphans >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 docker-compose up -d db --quiet-pull >/dev/null 2>&1 && NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 docker-compose run --rm migrate >/dev/null 2>&1 && node scripts/test/waitForPg.js && NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 vitest run --silent --reporter=dot tests/integration/api.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:web: NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 docker-compose down -v --remove-orphans >/dev/null 2>&1 || true && NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 docker-compose up -d db embedding reranker api web --quiet-pull >/dev/null 2>&1 && NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 docker-compose run --rm migrate >/dev/null 2>&1 && node scripts/test/waitForPg.js && WAIT_URL=http://localhost:8081/health WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS=300000 node scripts/test/waitForHttp.js && WAIT_URL=http://localhost:8082/health WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS=300000 node scripts/test/waitForHttp.js && SMOKE_SERVICES=api,db SMOKE_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 node scripts/smoke/waitForHealth.js && node scripts/test/seedDb.js && WAIT_URL=http://localhost:8080/web/index.html WAIT_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 node scripts/test/waitForHttp.js && NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 env -u FORCE_COLOR NO_COLOR=1 npx playwright install --with-deps >/dev/null 2>&1 && NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=error FORCE_COLOR=0 env -u FORCE_COLOR NO_COLOR=1 npx playwright test
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:py && npm run test:integration && npm run test:web
scripts.deploy:local:validate: npm run deploy:local && npm run test:all
